sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10116" key="a)nti/locos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντίλοξος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype> (or <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ος</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>), name of a <sense id="n10116.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandage,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:12:512" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fasc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.512</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:516C" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">516C.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
